name: Liquidity Red locks beliefs
description: When cash runway is below minimum months, liquidity is RED and tilts are disabled

name: Concentration breach no-worsen
description: When largest holding exceeds concentration cap, concentration is RED and tilts disabled. Target allocation should not worsen this position.
notes: TODO: When target-portfolio maths is implemented, assert that the target does not increase the concentrated position (no-worsen property)

name: Bed & ISA suggestion
description: When a GIA holding has unrealised gains above the trigger threshold and ISA headroom exists, Bed & ISA should be suggested
notes: TODO: When wrapper planning logic is implemented, this case should verify Bed & ISA suggestions are generated correctly. The Bond Fund has unrealised gain of 100 * (10-5) = 500, which is below the 1000 trigger, so it should NOT be suggested. Adjust test data or thresholds as needed.

name: All Green - tilts allowed
description: When all safety metrics are healthy, tilts should be allowed

name: Illiquids Red - tilts locked
description: When illiquid holdings exceed the maximum, illiquids is RED and tilts are disabled

name: Amber liquidity - tilts still allowed
description: When cash runway is in amber zone (between min and min*multiple), tilts are still allowed
